---
title: "Medhat Said"
toc: false 
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: /images/medpic.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/medhatsaid/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/medhat_said1/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/medhat-said/
    - icon: email
      text: Email
      href: mailto:medhatalamoudi@hotmail.com

---

### As you can see, there is still some work left to do on my digital garden 

:::{#hero-heading}

## Education

## Experience


:::

### This content appears below the formatted about page content.
